heroDesc: Aspiring Logistics Professional | Experience in Customer Engagement | Seeking Opportunities in Supply Chain & Logistics
aboutText: To contribute efficiently in the logistics industry by applying my knowledge, adaptability, and customer service skills while continuously learning and growing in the field. Seeking a logistics role to apply my skills and grow in the industry. To build a successful career in logistics and sales by utilizing my skills in communication, teamwork, and operations management to drive organizational success.

bullets: Ensuring accurate inbound operations by supervising, scanning unloading activities and verifying shipments as per documentation.
Coordinating with warehouse and delivery teams to ensure timely and correct movement of goods.
Monitored handling processes to maintain safety, accuracy, and operational efficiency during unloading and dispatch preparation.
Outbound Order Accuracy - Test whether the system shows the correct picking details, customer order info, and dispatch confirmation for outbound shipments.
Package Scanning Verification - Ensure the barcode scanner correctly identifies each package, matches it with the ERP record, and flags any wrong or missing items.
Provided detailed information about services and solutions.
